description_long: This is a small, single-story cabin with light-colored horizontal siding and a simple rectangular footprint. The structure features a gable roof, though part of the roof appears to be missing or damaged, exposing the interior. There is a single, plain door on one side, accompanied by a small rectangular window with a dark frame. The cabin sits on a patch of ground with some grass and debris scattered around, and there are visible foundation vents or latticework near the base. The exterior shows signs of wear, with some holes and irregularities in the siding, suggesting age or disrepair.
description: A small, weathered cabin with horizontal siding, a gable roof, a single door, and one window, showing signs of age and partial roof damage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main door, a small window to the left, and part of the roof missing.
description_view_1: Side/rear view highlighting the damaged siding, a foundation vent, and debris near the base.
description_view_2: Rear corner view with a visible hole in the siding and latticework at the foundation.
description_view_3: Opposite front corner showing the door, window, and more intact siding.
attribute_roof_type: gable roof with moderate pitch, partially missing or damaged, clad in what appears to be sheet material
attribute_window_arrangement: One small rectangular window on the front facade, positioned to the left of the door, with a dark frame; no other windows visible
attribute_door_placement: Single exterior door centered on the front facade, adjacent to the window
